articles.title: Taunton man convicted in fatal stabbing of Falmouth 19-year-old
articles.description:
The man drove to an apartment building in Falmouth with the intention of attacking the victim, prosecutors said.

The post Taunton man convicted in fatal stabbing of Falmouth 19-year-old appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taunton man convicted for the fatal stabbing of a 19-year-old in Falmouth.
Prosecutors revealed the man planned the attack before arriving at the apartment.
This conviction highlights ongoing concerns about youth violence in the region.

articles.title: Two-time Stanley Cup champion Panthers avoid playoff elimination with 2-1 win over Bruins
articles.description:
The Bruins, who had won four straight, got a goal from Fraser Minten. Jeremy Swayman made 22 saves in the loss.

The post Two-time Stanley Cup champion Panthers avoid playoff elimination with 2-1 win over Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins lose 2-1 to Panthers, ending their four-game winning streak.
Fraser Minten scored for the Bruins; Jeremy Swayman made 22 saves.
Boston's playoff hopes are affected as Panthers avoid elimination.

articles.title: State Police lieutenant named in report about sergeant’s alleged drunk driving reportedly suspended
articles.description:
The lieutenant allegedly told the Middlesex DA’s security director to take information about the sergeant’s crash “to the grave.”

The post State Police lieutenant named in report about sergeant’s alleged drunk driving reportedly suspended appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State Police lieutenant suspended amid allegations of covering up sergeant's drunk driving incident.
Lieutenant allegedly instructed Middlesex DA’s security director to conceal crash details.
Suspension raises concerns about accountability within Massachusetts State Police for Boston residents.

articles.title: Mass. couple sentenced to prison for manslaughter in death of infant foster child
articles.description:
The foster child died in the couple’s custody in 2020 after they ignored “clear and obvious signs” that he needed medical treatment.

The post Mass. couple sentenced to prison for manslaughter in death of infant foster child appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts couple sentenced to prison for manslaughter in infant foster child's death.
The child died in 2020 due to neglect of medical needs.
This case highlights the risks in foster care systems for Boston families.

articles.title: Salisbury woman gets life without parole for poisoning boyfriend
articles.description:
Judy Church, 67, was sentenced to life in prison without parole for fatally poisoning her boyfriend's Powerade drink with antifreeze.

The post Salisbury woman gets life without parole for poisoning boyfriend appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judy Church, 67, sentenced to life without parole for poisoning boyfriend.
Church poisoned boyfriend's drink with antifreeze, leading to his death.
This case raises concerns about domestic violence and safety in local communities.

articles.title: 5 concerning trends from the Red Sox’ ugly start to 2026 season
articles.description:
There have been few positives to draw out of Boston's 1-5 start to the 2026 season.

The post 5 concerning trends from the Red Sox’ ugly start to 2026 season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox start 2026 season with a disappointing 1-5 record.
Pitching struggles highlighted by poor performance from key players like Alex Cora.
Local fans express concern over team's direction and potential playoff implications.
